div.p: For bulk sends, use a transactional or marketing SMTP provider (not a shared mailbox such as Zoho Mail user SMTP). Use the previous setting to pick that outgoing server. At your DNS host, add the SPF, DKIM, and DMARC records your provider publishes for the From domain.

setting.help: Maximum mail.mail records processed each time the Mail: Email Queue Manager scheduled action runs.
Upper bound on messages grouped per SMTP configuration batch inside send().
Recipient chunk size when generating mass mailing mail.mail records.
Mass mailings with more recipients than this use the outgoing queue instead of sending immediately in the composer transaction.
